title: Bare Bones X Hold my Item
description: Give barebones access to the mod "Hold my item"
body:
**BEWARE THAT THIS ONLY WORKS ON HMI V4 OR ABOVE**

Bare Bones X HMI Adds Bare-bones support for the mod "[Hold my item](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items)". It changes the 3D bucket textures to fit with the Barebones texturepack. You can learn more about HMI here with this video here.

![Preview of the Texturepack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/78FtquDN/images/5c36a57b1ba6c70ce85a75971e1d65e581999ddc.png)


<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/fFGjnyAT0AA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>.
